description: This aerial image, captured in 2012 and credited to European Union LUCAS, depicts the coastal landscape of Salines des Pesquieres in Southern France. The central feature is a large complex of exploited coastal salines and/or fish farms, visible as a series of regularly shaped, interconnected water ponds. These ponds display varying colours from dark blue to light green, indicative of different water levels and conditions, and are located directly adjacent to the dark blue sea on the right. A developed urban area, characterized by white and grey building clusters, extends along the coastline towards the upper right, including a visible port or marina structure. Further inland, particularly in the upper left, the landscape is predominantly composed of agricultural land, distinguishable by numerous reddish-brown and lighter brown rectangular parcels.
